metadata.description: EstreGenesis self-hosted Claude Code plugin marketplace. Ships five Phase 2 production-ready plugins: Constellation (live multi-agent orchestration with WS server + A2A messaging + dashboard + MCP server with 5 tools), Superscalar (execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch + §3.1 Hyperbrief interlock), Hyperbrief (decision-delegation gating discipline with JSON IR + deterministic renderer + MCP server with 4 tools + PreToolUse/Stop hooks + §11.5 v1.0 readiness rubric), Greatpractice (practice-codification discipline with 3-tier macro/mezzo/micro hierarchy + 7-event lifecycle hooks + 5-axis multi-criteria maturation gate + frontmatter-driven governance SSoT — backed by 9-axis cross-domain deep research), and Ultrasafe (pre-release simulated penetration testing discipline with 8-agent parallel red-team fan-out + ≥3 iteration AND-gate clean-signal termination + 3-layer synthesis report — backed by 17-axis cross-domain deep research; advisory-only v0.1.x → blocking v0.2.x staged). Plugins are Apache-2.0 licensed; the marketplace mirrors the EG repo's main branch. Install via `/plugin marketplace add SoliEstre/EstreGenesis` then `/plugin install <name>@estregenesis-plugins`.

plugins.name: constellation
plugins.description: Live multi-agent orchestration client for Claude Code. Connects to a separately-running Constellation WebSocket server (user-provisioned; canonical reference impl at constellation/reference/runtime/server.cjs in this repo). MCP server exposes 5 tools (board_state_get / board_history_tail / agent_list_get / a2a_emit / a2a_wait_ack — tier='decided' application-tier extension included), 3 skills, and a Stop hook bundling pre-send-probe.cjs. Without a running WS server the plugin loads cleanly and degrades gracefully (skills are documentation-only, hook logs cleanly). v0.2.4 / Constellation v2.3.23 adds dashboard reference parity (upstream invite UI symmetric to collab — `UpstreamKeyIssued{joinUrl}` + `/join/upstream` onboarding md + URL/key dual-copy buttons; archived-tab button always-visible counter; collab/upstream onboarding md both inline a normative `메시지 채널 구분 — A2A vs 보드` guide directing joining agents to set `targetAgentId` explicitly on every outbound CUSTOM). v0.2.3 reflects bundle 007 absorption + Hyperbrief A2A-intent family (§13.16.9 — DECISION_REQUEST / DECISION_RESPONSE / DECISION_DEFER / DECISION_REJECT_FRAMING / HyperbriefCard) + §13.13.2 at-least-once relay reliability + chunked transfer reassembly. npm dep: ws ^8.18.0.

plugins.name: superscalar
plugins.description: Execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch. Wraps Superscalar.md v0.4.2 as a model-invoked skill: issue_width formula (effort_band + pace_mode + Little's Law + Kanban WIP + autonomy_available_workers) + worktree-isolated reorder buffer + cost-benefit gate (~30-60k token-horizon crossover) + opt-in speculation + adoption thresholds + n=8 dogfood ledger (Entry 05 + Entry 06 controlled A/B showing 'parallelism is not sufficient; orchestration discipline produces consistency') + v0.4.1 §3.1 Hyperbrief decision-delegation interlock (write/deploy/send lanes pass through both cost-benefit gate AND hyperbrief-trigger-check; read-only lanes exempt). 0 npm deps / 0 env.

plugins.name: hyperbrief
plugins.description: Decision-delegation gating discipline. Wraps Hyperbrief.md v0.5.6 as 3 model-invoked skills (hyperbrief-trigger-check + hyperbrief + hyperbrief-revisit) + JSON IR schema (FullBrief + BlockedStub variants) + 4 templates (MD + HTML × FullBrief + BlockedStub) + deterministic Node renderer (mini-engine.cjs with self-engineered placeholder substitution + 3-axis × 5-level tone profile + ajv schema validation) + MCP server exposing 4 tools (hyperbrief_render / hyperbrief_validate / decision_ledger_append / decision_ledger_query) + PreToolUse + Stop hooks in advise mode (4-way review-queue routing: Constellation board / standalone placeholder / setup-ask / silent). v0.5.6 adds the §5.6.7 + MUST-19 skill-side auto-localize discipline (button label + trigger phrases follow the user's prevailing conversation language; EN/KO/JA reference literals in spec). Cross-module integrations active: Constellation §13.16.9 (5 A2A intent names + ack_tier='decided') + Superscalar §3.1 (orthogonal gate at write/deploy/send lane retire). §11.5 v1.0 readiness rubric (Lens A 7-dim module-wide GA / Lens B 6-dim host-specific marketplace registration) shipped. 4 self-applied dogfood entries + adopter bundle 008. npm dep: ajv ^8.17.0.

plugins.name: greatpractice
plugins.description: Memory-triggered practice-codification discipline. Wraps Greatpractice.md v0.1.0 as 3 JSON schemas (entry-frontmatter.schema.json + hook-spec.schema.json + voice-rules.schema.json placeholder) + 1 PreToolUse contact hook (outbox-json-validate.cjs) backing the v2.5.50 first canonical entry greatpractice/mezzo/outbox-json-validation + v2.5.55 first canonical macro entry greatpractice/macro/release-cadence. Targets the 'quiet omission' surface — small obligations that should accompany the work (update docs alongside code, check before sending, sync paired surfaces) but slip through as memory notes accumulate. agent-workspace memory feedback (memory/feedback_*.md or equivalent) is the input trigger; raw signals route through a 5-axis multi-criteria maturation gate (frequency + depth + recency + cost + predictability weighted sum, threshold ≥ 18 OR 3-criterion notability gate) into a 3-tier macro/mezzo/micro hierarchy. Ratified entries are enforced via deterministic lifecycle hooks (SessionStart blocking · UserPromptSubmit path-scoped inject · PreToolUse 3-subtype poka-yoke contact/fixed-value/motion-step · PostToolUse SSoT propagation · Stop cycle-end probe · PostCompact working-set restore). phronesis_boundary field carves out judgement-heavy work that should NOT be codified. Frontmatter is governance SSoT (9/9 cross-axis universal convergence). Backed by 9-axis cross-domain deep research (harness · humanities · psychology · management · processor · os · sre · memoization · canonical). Normative justification via Clark-Chalmers coupling condition (Distributed Cognition) + Powell-DiMaggio 3-isomorphism (Organizational Anthropology). v0.1.0 first cut ships the spec + 1 ratified mezzo entry + 1 micro atom + contact-type PreToolUse hook; v0.2-0.4 roadmap defines manifest hash + renderers + voice linter + MESI multi-agent coherence + CMMI L4 effectiveness measurement. 0 npm deps (v0.1.0).

plugins.name: ultrasafe
plugins.description: Pre-release / pre-update simulated penetration testing discipline. Wraps Ultrasafe.md v0.1.0 as a minimal plugin scaffold (manifest + readme); runtime/schemas/skills/hooks/mcp deferred to v0.2+. Distilled from 17-axis cross-domain deep research (harness · web-api-infra · ai-red-team · threat-modeling · multi-agent-distributed · adversarial-ml · fuzzing-pbt · supply-chain-sbom · devsecops-policy-as-code · incident-response-disclosure · cryptography-key-mgmt · human-factors-se-opsec · game-theory-asymmetry · compliance-standards · cognitive-decision-bias · security-visualization-dashboard · protocol-trust-evolution). Three architectural backbones: parallel attacker-perspective fan-out (16/17 axes cross-convergence) + cross-axis synthesis at retire-barrier (15/17 axes) + ≥3 iteration multi-condition AND clean-signal termination (14/17 axes). 8-agent v0.1.0 minimum parallel red-team fan-out (AI/LLM · Web/API · Supply · Crypto · Social · Method/Comp · TM/Lifecycle · Synthesizer) + GTA/DSP cross-cutting. 3-layer synthesis report (OSCAL Assessment Result + Hyperbrief 9-section IR + Greatpractice tree candidate). 4-condition AND clean-signal gate (regression-free + monotonic finding-reduction + coverage-floor + 2 iter consecutive). Tier A 5 critic patches absorbed inline (broker surface deep-dive + coverage methodology + schema evolution + regression baseline + strict-mode reconciliation). Dual pre-release trigger (PreToolUse hook + /ultrasafe skill — both deferred to v0.2). Advisory-only v0.1.x → blocking v0.2.x staged transition. 5 new Constellation A2A intents specified as future work (ULTRASAFE_FINDING / ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY / ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE / SECURITY_DISCLOSURE_INTAKE / MPCVD_COORDINATION). Normative grounding: Schneier asymmetry + Herley cost-asymmetry + population-level trust erosion (HTTP→HTTPS analog). 0 npm deps (v0.1.0).
